acceptanceCriteria: CHANGELOG.md renames the Unreleased heading to '## 0.9.0 - 2026-07-12' with the #15, #21-amendment, and #48 entries preserved, a previously missing #14 escalate-decide entry added, and an honesty note on the #48 entry recording the post-#50 divergence of the pinned CI verifier and the owner's explicit deferral of the re-sync.
dist/rigor.cjs is unchanged in this release (no source change; last rebuilt in #50).
rigor release-check --version 0.9.0 passes on the merged main SHA after the release PR merges, before tagging.
constraints: Mechanical release change only: no source, schema, docs, workflow, or dist edits.
Do not create keys, secrets, attestations, or GitHub configuration, and do not increase any workflow permission.

Do not describe the release as attested or as carrying provenance; the added CHANGELOG entries must not overstate any control (Codex-produced #14 base implementation stays disclosed as unattested, the pinned verifier divergence stays disclosed).
